evals.prompt: Bootstrap LRO on an agent that already has the proto-backed tools package from add-tool. No LRO tools yet — just infra, InitLRO, lroresume, and weblro launcher wiring.
evals.expected_output: alis.lro.v2 infra module guidance, grpc.go InitLRO, internal/lroresume package, main.go MustInitLRO and weblro launcher, tools.go NewLROTool snippet merged, build passes
assertions: Asks user to run define before Go when tools.proto changed
InitLRO or MustInitLRO with service id matching infra neuron
weblro NewLauncher with WithServiceID and WithLROClient
Does not run define or terraform apply

evals.prompt: Add an LRO tool run_deep_research that takes a prompt and returns a long-running operation with progress metadata and a final answer.
evals.expected_output: RunDeepResearch RPC with operation_info, RPC handler with NewOperation and ResumeViaTasks, resumable handler, AddResumableHandler, NewLROTool in MyTools
assertions: tools.proto defines LRO RPC with google.longrunning.operation_info
Resumable handler registered with unique resume path
ResumeAfterOperation or resume-flow referenced when chat should continue

evals.prompt: Add a second LRO tool process_batch with its own resume path; do not collide with run_deep_research.
evals.expected_output: Separate resume path constant, separate AddResumableHandler registration, separate private state type, NewLROTool process_batch
assertions: Distinct resume path string for second tool
Does not reuse run-deep-research resume path
